item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
zip ties.. is there anything they CAN'T do??
oof
why did it have to be so wide
why is he looking in the Es and Fs
dog wants to help
that's off putting
aren't we all
always wanted one
i swear by this stuff
imagine the possibilities
mmm hmm
wonder if it's at a lobster restaurant
i guess
sounds like witchcraft
this always happens
that's kind of harsh
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Kraftwerk plays before a confused audience for the first time (1970) ( sound on )
item.description: "Wir fahren, fahren, fahren auf der Autobahn" it isn't.... This is one of the earliest existing concert videos documenting the birth of electronic music.

item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Thighhigh thursday! Plus update
item.description: Edit- Omg really?! Most viral?! Thankyouuuu! This made my day, and I'm glad it made most of yours. Xx enjoy Hi! Thankyou to all of you who have checked up on my posts wondering if I am doing well. It's been heartwarming to know there are kind ppl who care. I have been having physical and mental issues as a result from chemotherapy and post trauma- but I am being supported and making small progress. And although I'm still having maintenance treatment, so far my scans say I'm still in the clear. I'm only one year into my remission- usually it takes five full years of clear scans to be labelled true remission. But so far so good. It's an everyday battle and I'm thankful for you all who have made me smile- either with posts or comments. Thankyou! Keep being awesome!
item.dc:creator: WitchyVixen

item.title: The .. is .. evil!
item.description: (Suggestion: watch till the end)

item.title: US academic system
item.dc:creator: Vargood

item.title: Can I offer you some Pilfered Trans Memes in these trying times?
item.description:
TO BE CLEAR, I'm not advocating for violence, but if they do come for us I'm just saying tradition is tradition. I'm back with another trans meme dump, as usual I will TRY to be as inclusive as I can with a selection of femme, masc, bean, phobic mocking and general shenanigans in no particular order. But all booty is subject to the rules of the high seas. Please keep in mind I am Trans Femme myself and therefore some memes may relate to my personal experience and are not meant to invalidate the experiences of others. With that out the way please enjoy and stay safe out there. *hugs*
How about NO!
transbians irl :P knowing full well I fit into this meme ;_;
I'll take those odds.
A reminder for any uninformed non-trans and misinformed transphobes out there passing through this meme dump, we don't BECOME trans, we don't get indoctrinated or groomed into it or even CHOOSE to be trans. We just are. The only thing we CAN choose is whether or not to come out and transition. Same for anyone in the LGBTQ+
If your foundation crumbles by our very existence, your foundation was weak and should be destroyed.
Reddit in a nutshell sometimes... and yet there's tons of people bitching reddit is too left leaning/woke...
Found in a schoolyard
I tried on a sundress a coworker gave me the other day and OOF, I looked like an overstuffed peach in a too tight bag... doesn't help i'm retaining 40-45lbs of water but still, it hurts a bit.
They confused but they got the spirit...
Would love to do the latter if I didn't absolutely hate my real voice. I'm still having issues keeping my voice where I want it and since I'd still like a lower register but softer tone I keep being afraid I'll slip back into the horribleness...
Unmute, or don't. I'm not your Mommy.
Don't want to support sexabusebisoft but at the same time, good on bioware for this
Would it be tacky/cringe if I bought a neclace with this molecule?
Muffled bane in Harley Show will never not be funny to me.
survive.gif
Got my first skirt last week, even wore it at work for a couple of hours to get a coworkers opinion, it was super comfy. and today my thigh highs arrived, just a pair of black and a pair of grey ones, not stripey but still. It's a bit too cold to wear right now though.
Sorry, I don't make the rules, it's draft time...
Dunno if this was a oneshot or a series but still so wholesome.
Not me, All I get is ugandan refugee scammers. Also not courageous or pretty enough to post on those subs. But I see the constant stream of chasers even on non dating subs
reminder that NNN is a scam.
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
Noir Tax, he keeps stealing the makeshift leg rest I'm using to stop water retention from turning my legs and feet into tree trunks. But he looks so cute doing it I can't fault him for it.
item.dc:creator: MelodyLightfoot

item.title: Day 79 of toph and me
item.description: Sharing my orange rescue girl everyday. I’m not sure why some of you want to see me and my cat but here we are. Front page edit: Wow I guess people have spoken… I will post with me and my cat more often. Really made my day everyone saying such nice things - big arms and cute. I work out. Thanks Imgur community!

Pffffttttt
Facts.

The midnight corn.

item.title: Krampus is riling up the conservatives in my small town.
item.description: Someone thought it would be hilarious to have someone dressed as Krampus wrap up our local parade. The people here have been raging about it ever since on the community Facebook page. I caught this one before they managed to delete it. That's small town Oklahoma for you! This led to full on death threats.
item.dc:creator: NihilisticOnion

item.title: The Perseverance rover captured this video of a partial solar eclipse on Mars caused by the small moon Phobos. This video is real time.

item.dc:creator: RobSquareBalls

item.title: Baby Manatee and its mom passing under a dock and eating mangrove leaves
item.description: Manatees eat just about any vegetation they can find, not just sea grass. Like bottlenose dolphins, the females raise the calves alone. And also like bottlenose dolphins, if you see a group of them, it is Not a family of directly related individuals. It's just a group of individuals that have decided to hang out together for a while. A group of manatees is an aggregation. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: Images of Note: neigh
item.description:
kinda sucks how stargazing season is also cold-as-balls season.
They got the tired eyes and frazzled hair.
[HEAVY METAL PLAYS]
WHAT DO YOU MEAN THE REST OF THE WORLD DOES THEIR CHOCOLATE IN PORTRAIT??????
OK but one thing that people don't realize about Horses is that back in the old days horses just shit on the street in amounts that required constant cleaning to the point that in the 1890s one person said that at current rates London would shut down from Horse Shit by the 1940s. Literally the only thing that the Car saved us from iirc.
WHERE ARE THEY GROWN, ANON? WHERE?! THE USA IS 34TH IN COFFEE PRODUCTION AND THEY SURE THE FUCK AREN'T FUCKING MAKING ENOUGH TO KEEP EVERYONE THERE IN COFFEE!
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Gnostic Christianity is fucking wild.
owo
Fuentes is hiding in his mother's house....after saying "Your body, my choice".
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Fuck now I want some coffee. Fuck all of y'all.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
